COLLECTOR-BAG_OF_TRICKS.title: Bag of Tricks
COLLECTOR-BAG_OF_TRICKS.description: At the start of each combat, draw [blue]2[/blue] Collected cards.
COLLECTOR-BLOCKED_CHAKRA.title: Blocked Chakra
COLLECTOR-BLOCKED_CHAKRA.description: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of your turn. You don't draw from your Collected pile until your 4th turn.
COLLECTOR-BLOCKED_CHAKRA.flavor: One pulled muscle is all it takes.
COLLECTOR-BOTTLED_BRAIN.title: Bottled Brain
COLLECTOR-BOTTLED_BRAIN.description: Upon pickup, Upgrade a card in your Collection. Start combats with it on top of your Collected pile.
COLLECTOR-EMERALD_TORCH.title: Emerald Torch
COLLECTOR-EMERALD_TORCH.flavor: The fires of greed never fade.
COLLECTOR-JADE_RING.title: Jade Ring
COLLECTOR-JADE_RING.flavor: Jade is the symbol of honesty.
COLLECTOR-KRAMPIAN_COAL.title: Krampian Coal
COLLECTOR-KRAMPIAN_COAL.description: When you would draw from an empty Collected pile, add a [gold]Lucky Wick[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
COLLECTOR-KRAMPIAN_COAL.flavor: "Intriguing! But why only specific chimneys?" - Ranwid
COLLECTOR-PRISMATIC_TORCH.title: Prismatic Torch
COLLECTOR-PRISMATIC_TORCH.description: Replaces [aqua]Emerald Torch[/aqua]. At the start of each combat, add an [gold]Ember[/gold] into your Hand and gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Reserve[/gold]. The first time you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] an [gold]Ember[/gold] each turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Reserve[/gold].
COLLECTOR-PRISMATIC_TORCH.flavor: The ever-changing flames reflect fortune's favor.
COLLECTOR-SOUL_LIT_LAMP.title: Soul-lit Lamp
COLLECTOR-SOUL_LIT_LAMP.description: Upon pickup, gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Essence[/gold]. At the start of combat, add an [gold]Ember[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
COLLECTOR-SOUL_LIT_LAMP.flavor: A ghoulish decoration. The crackles of fire are replaced by buzzing wails.
COLLECTOR-THE_CONTRACT.title: The Contract
COLLECTOR-THIMBLE_HELM.title: Thimble Helm
COLLECTOR-THIMBLE_HELM.description: At the start of combat [gold]Kindle[/gold] [blue]3[/blue]. While [gold]Torchhead[/gold] is alive, cards grant [blue]1[/blue] additional [gold]Block[/gold].
COLLECTOR-THIMBLE_HELM.flavor: Worn by the Spire's miniest heroes.
